# workflows

## Purpose
GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow definitions. Automates Lighthouse performance and accessibility audits.

## Key Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `lighthouse.yml` | Lighthouse CI workflow — runs performance, accessibility, and best-practice audits on deploy |
